indications.text:
Zolpimist (zolpidem tartrate) Oral Spray is indicated for the short-term treatment of insomnia
characterized by difficulties with sleep initiation. Zolpidem tartrate has been shown to decrease
sleep latency for up to 35 days in controlled clinical studies [see Clinical Studies (14)].
The clinical tr...
